site.title: Chayn
site.description: Chayn — lingo aur himsa ke shikar logon ki madad karne wali ek global charity.

temp.heading: Next.js Starter Template
temp.intro: Chayn web projects ke liye ek production-ready, multilingual neenv — accessible, GDPR-anukul, aur trauma-informed design ke saath banaya gaya.
temp.githubCtaAriaLabel: GitHub par Chayn dekhein (nayi tab mein khuliga)

stackItems.label: Next.js 16
stackItems.desc: App Router, React Server Components, static rendering, Turbopack

stackItems.label: React 19
stackItems.desc: Default se Server Components — static layouts ke liye zero JS

stackItems.label: Tailwind CSS 4
stackItems.desc: Design tokens, utility-first styling — clsx ya tailwind-merge nahi

stackItems.label: next-intl 4
stackItems.desc: English (UK) aur Hindi (Latin script) locales, RTL-ready architecture

stackItems.label: WCAG AA
stackItems.desc: Default se accessible: skip links, ARIA roles, poore mein semantic HTML

stackItems.label: GDPR compliance
stackItems.desc: Cookie consent gate — bina explicit consent ke koi tracking script load nahi hoti

stackItems.label: Rollbar
stackItems.desc: IPs anonymise karke aur fingerprinting band karke error tracking

stackItems.label: Cypress 15
stackItems.desc: GitHub Actions CI pipeline ke saath end-to-end test suite

temp.typographyBodyExample: Open Sans mein body text. Sab paragraph copy, navigation, labels, aur UI elements ke liye upyog kiya jaata hai. Har size par saaf aur padhne mein aasaan — Chayn ke survivor-facing kaam ke liye ek garam, approachable character ke saath.
temp.typographySmallExample: Chhota text — captions, footnotes, aur supporting copy.
temp.componentsCardBorderedLabel: .card-bordered — peach border ke saath rounded container
temp.componentsCardTintedDesc: Featured ya highlighted content blocks ke liye upyog karein.
temp.componentsCardWhiteDesc: List items ya secondary content areas ke liye upyog karein.
temp.startIntro: Fork karein, customize karein, aur ship karein.
temp.step1Desc: Repository ko clone karein aur dependencies install karein.
temp.step2Desc: Example env file copy karein aur apne values bharein. Sab integrations optional hain — app bina inke bhi chalti hai.
temp.step3Desc: Apne browser mein <link>localhost:3000</link> kholein aur build karna shuru karein.
temp.chaynTrackDesc: Chayn ka branding aur assets rakhen — bas apni samagri jodein.
temp.chaynCheck3: NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL ko apne production domain par set karein
temp.chaynCheck4: .env.local ke zariye optional integrations configure karein (Rollbar, GA4, Hotjar)
temp.chaynCheck5: app/[locale]/ ke andar routes aur pages jodein
temp.chaynCheck6: app/[locale]/page.tsx mein is page ko apni samagri se badlein
temp.externalTrackHeading: Nayi sanstha ke liye fork karna
temp.externalTrackDesc: Chayn track ki sab cheezein, aur poora rebrand bhi.
temp.externalCheck1: Upar diye gaye Chayn project track mein sab kuch
temp.externalCheck2: public/favicon.ico, public/og-image.png, public/apple-touch-icon.png, aur app/icon.png ko apne assets se badlein
temp.externalCheck3: app/globals.css mein @theme inline ke andar colour palette update karein
temp.externalCheck5: components/layout/Footer.tsx aur TopNav.tsx se Chayn branding aur links hatayein
temp.externalCheck6: i18n/routing.ts aur lib/locale-dir.ts mein locales jodein ya hatayein

nav.ctaAriaLabel: Chayn website par jaayein (nayi tab mein khuliga)

footer.tagline: Ek global charity jo lingo aur himsa ke shikar logon ki madad karti hai.
footer.chaynHomepageLabel: Chayn — mukhya website par jaayein (nayi tab mein khuliga)

leaveSite.ariaLabel: Jaldi yeh site chhodein — ek surakshit page khuliga aur browser history replace hogi

error.heading: Kuch galat ho gaya
error.refreshPrompt: Kuch galat ho gaya. Kripaya page ko refresh karein.

cookieBanner.heading: Hum analytics cookies ka upyog karte hain
cookieBanner.body: yeh samajhne ke liye ki visitors is site se kaise judtey hain aur Chayn ki samagri ko behtar banane ke liye. Koi bhi vyaktigat data becha ya advertisers ke saath share nahi kiya jaata.
cookieBanner.updateBody: Hum analytics ka upyog karte hain yeh samajhne ke liye ki log hamare resources se kaise judtey hain aur survivors ke liye hamaari sahayata behtar banane ke liye. Koi bhi vyaktigat data store ya share nahi kiya jaata.
